title: hordeum jubatum subsp. brachyantherum
intro: Hordeum jubatum subsp. brachyantherum, also known as blue wildrye or green wildrye, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and promoting wound healing. Hordeum jubatum subsp. brachyantherum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine.
